name: slc-system
description: Stars Law College Finance & Student Management System

scripts.dev: kill-port 3000 3001 && npm run sync:env && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.dev:infra: kill-port 3000 3001 && docker compose up -d db redis minio
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:infra && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
scripts.stop:infra: docker compose stop db redis minio
